text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp is here once again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prepare Rice Shower to run the ultimate race,
at the ultimate course, against the ultimate
racers...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We begin our grueling hot summer training!
